headline: How The Ingevity (NGVT) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: Analysts have lifted their price target for Ingevity to US$79.25, while keeping the model’s fair value output at US$79.25, signaling a stable core valuation framework. This change is tied to updated analyst commentary that weighs opportunity against execution risk, as models are refreshed around discount rates, long term revenue assumptions, and profit margins. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you track Ingevity’s story from here. Analyst Price...
